raw_research: Notion is a productivity and collaboration platform founded in 2013. They offer an all-in-one workspace combining notes, docs, wikis, and project management. The company has over 30 million users and raised $275M in Series C at a $10B valuation. Recent news: Notion launched Notion AI in 2023, expanding into AI-powered writing assistance. Their tech stack includes React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. Key competitors include Confluence, Coda, and Monday.com. Leadership includes CEO Ivan Zhao and COO Akshay Kothari. They primarily sell to product teams, engineering teams, and operations teams at mid-market and enterprise companies.
